description: A single credential requirement or prerequisite. Specifies what a candidate or enrollee must hold. Category is a broad class; subtype is the specific credential within that class.

category.description: Broad class of the required credential.

subtype.description: Specific credential within the category. Examples: "AWS_SAA", "BTECH_CS", "LMV_LICENSE", "Aadhaar", "Java_SE_11".

mandatory.description: Whether this requirement is mandatory. If true, failure to satisfy it blocks the transaction. If false, it is advisory / preferred.

title: CredentialRequirement
